title: bartlettina williamsii
intro: Bartlettina williamsii, also known as the "Mexican mint" or "tree mint", is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bartlettina williamsii include relieving fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, making it a popular remedy in traditional folk medicine.
